name: The Pig and the Lady
tagline: Vietnamese-Hawaiian fusion that put Chinatown dining on the map — Chef Andrew Le's pho French dip is genius.
mustOrder: Pho French dip — prime rib dipped in pho broth, absolute game changer
Crispy crepe banh xeo — stuffed with shrimp, pork, and herbs
Smoked meat pho — rich bone broth with brisket and all the fixings
parking: Street parking on Smith or Hotel St. Chinatown garage at 1130 N Nimitz Hwy is cheapest. Meter parking free after 6pm.
talkStory: Chef Andrew Le started at the KCC Farmers Market and blew up from there. The dinner menu is creative Vietnamese-meets-local, and the Saturday farmers market booth still has lines. Dinner reservations recommended — walk-ins can try the bar. The Chinatown location has serious energy on Friday and Saturday nights. If you want the more casual lunch vibe, they do a killer weekday lunch too.
